title: Hot Stuff
album: Endless Summer (Donna Summer's Greatest Hits) [European Version]
why_this_song: Hot Stuff by Donna Summer (1979) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "stuff" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "stuff" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Sittin' here eatin' my heart out waitin'
I want some hot stuff baby this evenin'
Sittin' here eatin' my heart out, no reason

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Waitin' for some lover to call
How's about some hot stuff baby this evenin'
I need some hot stuff baby tonight

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Hot Stuff" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Hot Stuff" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Hot Stuff" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Hot Stuff" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Hot Stuff" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Hot Stuff"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
